VAL-ENHANCE-001.details: _gather_ask_context() in web.py calls search_facts_semantic(conn, query_vec, ...) after FTS fact search, deduplicates using seen_fact_ids set. Unit test test_gather_ask_context_calls_search_facts_semantic passes.

VAL-ENHANCE-002.details: _gather_ask_context() in web.py calls _semantic_search(query, conn, ...) after FTS message search, deduplicates using seen_msg_ids set. Unit test test_gather_ask_context_includes_semantic_messages passes.

VAL-ENHANCE-003.details: Both seen_fact_ids and seen_msg_ids sets are used. FTS results added first, semantic results only appended when ID not in seen set. Unit tests test_gather_ask_context_deduplicates_facts_by_id and test_gather_ask_context_deduplicates_messages_by_id both pass.

VAL-ENHANCE-004.details: memory_deep_recall() in mcp_server.py has Step 1b after FTS: calls _search_facts_semantic(conn, query_vec, limit=5), deduplicates against existing fact_lines by parsing fact IDs into seen_ids set, appends new results.

VAL-ENHANCE-005.details: memory_deep_recall() in mcp_server.py has Step 2b after FTS: calls _search_similar(query, conn=conn, top_k=5, ...), deduplicates against existing msg_lines by string comparison, appends new results.

VAL-CROSS-001.details: pytest tests/ -v: 257 passed, 0 failed, 3 warnings (deprecation only). 166 original + 91 new tests all pass.
